languages.text: "Мне бабка когда-то рассказывала истории про Первый Призыв. Вроде как ваш предок говаривал, что спасти можно даже обреченного, ибо в благодарности своей он свершит великие дела. У нас не принято тратить силы на невозможное, но теперь... Спасибо вам еще раз. Полк не забудет вашего поступка!"

"My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"
languages.original_text: "Мне бабка когда-то рассказывала истории про Первый Призыв. Вроде как ваш предок говаривал, что спасти можно даже обреченного, ибо в благодарности своей он свершит великие дела. У нас не принято тратить силы на невозможное, но теперь... Спасибо вам еще раз. Полк не забудет вашего поступка!"

Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

It is not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

"My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

"My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

languages.text: “我奶奶给我讲过那些初代征召者的故事。据说您的先祖曾说过，哪怕是注定没救的人也值得一救，因为他们的感念之情会催生出伟大的功业来。我们向来不会把力气浪费在没结果的事上，可现在……还是要再次感谢您。我们军团绝不会忘记您今天所做的一切！”
languages.original_text: "My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

traits.locale_text: “我奶奶给我讲过那些初代征召者的故事。据说您的先祖曾说过，哪怕是注定没救的人也值得一救，因为他们的感念之情会催生出伟大的功业来。我们向来不会把力气浪费在没结果的事上，可现在……还是要再次感谢您。我们军团绝不会忘记您今天所做的一切！”

languages.text: "Ninem bana İlk Sevk Grubu hakkında hikâyeler anlatırdı. Atanızın şöyle dediği söylenir: Mahkûm olanlar bile kurtarılmaya değerdir çünkü minnet borçları, onları büyük işler yapmaya yöneltir. Umutsuz vakalar için çaba harcamak, pek yaptığımız bir şey değildir ama... Bir kez daha teşekkür ederim. Alay, yaptıklarınızı unutmayacak!"
languages.original_text: "My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

traits.locale_text: "Ninem bana İlk Sevk Grubu hakkında hikâyeler anlatırdı. Atanızın şöyle dediği söylenir: Mahkûm olanlar bile kurtarılmaya değerdir çünkü minnet borçları, onları büyük işler yapmaya yöneltir. Umutsuz vakalar için çaba harcamak, pek yaptığımız bir şey değildir ama... Bir kez daha teşekkür ederim. Alay, yaptıklarınızı unutmayacak!"

languages.text: « Ma grand-mère me racontait souvent des histoires sur les Premiers Mobilisés. D'après elles, votre ancêtre disait que même les personnes condamnées valent la peine d'être sauvées, car ensuite, leur gratitude les pousse à accomplir de grands exploits. Nous n'avons pas l'habitude de gaspiller nos efforts sur des causes perdues, mais maintenant... Merci encore. Le régiment n'oubliera pas ce que vous avez fait ! »
languages.original_text: "My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

traits.locale_text: « Ma grand-mère me racontait souvent des histoires sur les Premiers Mobilisés. D'après elles, votre ancêtre disait que même les personnes condamnées valent la peine d'être sauvées, car ensuite, leur gratitude les pousse à accomplir de grands exploits. Nous n'avons pas l'habitude de gaspiller nos efforts sur des causes perdues, mais maintenant... Merci encore. Le régiment n'oubliera pas ce que vous avez fait ! »

languages.text: «Mi abuela contaba historias de los primeros llamados. Dicen que su antepasado creía en salvar hasta a los condenados, ya que su gratitud les lleva a grandes gestas. No podemos desperdiciar esfuerzos en causas perdidas, pero, ahora... Gracias, una vez más. ¡El regimiento no olvidará lo que ha hecho!».
languages.original_text: "My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

traits.locale_text: «Mi abuela contaba historias de los primeros llamados. Dicen que su antepasado creía en salvar hasta a los condenados, ya que su gratitud les lleva a grandes gestas. No podemos desperdiciar esfuerzos en causas perdidas, pero, ahora... Gracias, una vez más. ¡El regimiento no olvidará lo que ha hecho!».

languages.text: "Meine Großmutter hat mir immer Geschichten über die Erste Einberufung erzählt. Es heißt, Euer Ahnherr habe einmal gesagt, dass selbst die Verlorenen es wert sind, gerettet zu werden, denn ihre Dankbarkeit veranlasst sie zu großen Taten. Es ist nicht unsere Art, für aussichtslose Sachen zu kämpfen, aber jetzt ... Danke noch einmal. Das Regiment wird nicht vergessen, was Ihr getan habt."
languages.original_text: "My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

traits.locale_text: "Meine Großmutter hat mir immer Geschichten über die Erste Einberufung erzählt. Es heißt, Euer Ahnherr habe einmal gesagt, dass selbst die Verlorenen es wert sind, gerettet zu werden, denn ihre Dankbarkeit veranlasst sie zu großen Taten. Es ist nicht unsere Art, für aussichtslose Sachen zu kämpfen, aber jetzt ... Danke noch einmal. Das Regiment wird nicht vergessen, was Ihr getan habt."

languages.text: 「私の祖母は、最初の召集について話してくれた。祖先たちは、たとえ死を待つ者であっても救う価値があると説いていた。感謝の借りは、偉業へと繋がるものだからだ。我々は無駄な努力を無駄なことに費やすものではないが、今... ありがとう。この部隊は、君がしたこと決して忘れない！」
languages.original_text: "My gran would tell me stories about the First Call-Up. It's believed that your ancestor used to say that even the doomed are worth saving, for their debt of gratitude leads to grand deeds. It's not our way to waste our efforts on lost causes, but now... Thank you once again. The regiment will not forget what you have done!"

traits.locale_text: 「私の祖母は、最初の召集について話してくれた。祖先たちは、たとえ死を待つ者であっても救う価値があると説いていた。感謝の借りは、偉業へと繋がるものだからだ。我々は無駄な努力を無駄なことに費やすものではないが、今... ありがとう。この部隊は、君がしたこと決して忘れない！」
